notes: Coconut bowl/cup market heavily saturated - Jungle Culture, GoodVieco, ENEOCARE all selling sustainable coconut bowls/cups with bamboo accessories on Amazon. Zero brand gap.

product_name: Chocolatera traditional chocolate pot with molinillo
notes: Molinillo market saturated - Verve Culture, Casa De Queta, La Mexicana all selling molinillo whisks and gift sets (chocolate + molinillo + mugs). Would need extremely differentiated positioning.
Insulated coffee dispenser market dominated by Stanley, Yeti, Hydro Flask. Adding a spigot isn't differentiated enough. Generic.
Glass pitcher with infusion chamber is commodity product. Amazon has hundreds of fruit infusion pitchers. No defensible brand differentiation.
Artisan mug market saturated - thousands of ceramic/clay mug brands. 'Mug + recipe card' isn't a brand, it's a commodity. Ultra-competitive.

product_name: Colombian chocolate tablets/bars with recipe booklet
notes: Drinking chocolate market has Abuelita, Ibarra (established), plus specialty brands. Would compete on quality/sourcing which requires expertise and scale.

product_name: Arepa press with integrated burger press
notes: Not drinkware/barware - kitchen tool. Also, arepa press market already served by multiple brands on Amazon.
Champús is ultra-niche, zero US awareness. Fermentation pitcher market saturated (kombucha crocks, etc.). No crossover appeal.
Shaker bottle market dominated by BlenderBottle, Contigo, etc. 'Recipe for Latin breakfast drinks' isn't differentiated. Commodity category.
Ceramic bowl + spoon set. Thousands of competitors. No defensible positioning. Warm breakfast beverage is niche within niche.
Fermentation crock market heavily saturated - Mortier Pilon, Humble House, Cultures for Health, Nourished Essentials all make fermentation vessels with taps. Zero brand gap.
Fresh coconut tapping is ultra-niche. Most US consumers buy packaged coconut water. Tool would require education on sourcing fresh coconuts (not practical for most markets).
Same as guarapo fermentation jar - fermentation vessel market fully saturated with established brands.

product_name: Lime squeezer for aguapanela con limón
notes: Citrus press market dominated by Chef'n, OXO, hand-held squeezers. Premium citrus press with strainer is not differentiated - hundreds exist on Amazon.
Double-wall glass market saturated - Bodum, JoyJolt, Zwilling all make affordable double-wall glasses. Commodity product with thin margins.

product_name: Panela block storage tin with grater
notes: NOT REJECTED - this became validated idea #299 (PanelaBar brand concept). Repositioned as energy drink kit rather than cooking sweetener storage.

product_name: Colombian tinto portable coffee filter bag
notes: Reusable coffee filter market served by CoffeeSock, other cloth filter brands. Small market, low margin, commoditized.
